##MODIFIED VANILLA FILE##
@correct_culture_primary_score = 100
@better_than_the_alternatives_score = 50
@always_primary_score = 1000
@never_primary_score = -1000

#Title order determines which title shows in title history if multiple titles are held. ie: If k_croatia is higher in this file than k_hungary then the Kings of Hungary will show as Kings of Croatia in the title history when they hold both titles. The main effect from this is screwing up regnal numbers
#Normally I labeled added or changed titles
#The 'capital' of a duchy MUST be the first province in the listing or it won't get the duchy capital building

## NOBLE FAMILIES at bottom. Landless adventurer titles

	no_automatic_claims = yes
	definite_form = yes

	can_create_on_partition = { always = no }
}

########################################################################################RELIGIOUS HEADS########################################################################################

k_papal_state = { # Localized as Papal States

	color = { 245 249 198 }

	definite_form = yes
	ruler_uses_title_name = no
	can_use_nomadic_naming = no
	landless = yes

	capital = c_roma

	ai_primary_priority = {
		add = @always_primary_score
	}

	destroy_if_invalid_heir = yes
	no_automatic_claims = yes
	always_follows_primary_heir = yes
	de_jure_drift_disabled = yes

	holding_regnal_male_names = { Alexander Anastasius Benedictus Caelestinus Callistus Clemens Eugenius Leo Gregorius Hadrianus Honorius Innocentius Ioannes Lucius Marinus Martinus Nicolaus Sergius Silvester Stephanus Urbanus Victor }
}

k_papal_states = { #Basically to use this as the de jure title instead of the above since you can't properly usurp faith head titles # Localized as Papal States

	color = { 245 249 198 }

	definite_form = yes
	ruler_uses_title_name = no
	can_use_nomadic_naming = no

	capital = c_roma

	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = culture:italian
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}
	}

	destroy_if_invalid_heir = yes
	no_automatic_claims = yes
	always_follows_primary_heir = yes
	#de_jure_drift_disabled = yes

	#holding_regnal_male_names = { Alexander Anastasius Benedictus Caelestinus Callistus Clemens Eugenius Leo Gregorius Hadrianus Honorius Innocentius Ioannes Lucius Marinus Martinus Nicolaus Sergius Silvester Stephanus Urbanus Victor }
}

		rule_title_creation_imperial_power_projection_title_creation_trigger = yes
	}

e_horn = { # Localized as Golden Horn Sulṭānate
	color = { 67 96 179 }

	capital = c_zaila
	can_be_named_after_dynasty = no
	definite_form = yes
	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_east_african }
					culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_somalian }
				}
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}
	}

}

e_bulgaria = { #Becomes de_jure empire for Bulgaria # Localized as Bulgarian Empire
	color = { 108 78 110 }

	capital = c_turnovo # Tyrnovo
	definite_form = yes
	can_be_named_after_dynasty = no #Don't want dynasty names
	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = culture:bulgarian
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}
	}
	can_create = {
		rule_title_creation_imperial_power_projection_title_creation_trigger = yes
		trigger_if = {
			limit = {
				is_ai = yes
			}
			culture = culture:bulgarian
		}
	}

}

	k_wales = { # Localized as Wales
		color = { 135 25 3 }

		capital = c_caernarfonshire # Gwynedd

		can_create = {
			trigger_if = {
				limit = {
					is_ai = yes
				}
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_brythonic }
			}
		}

		ai_primary_priority = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					culture = culture:welsh
				}
				add = @correct_culture_primary_score
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						culture = culture:cumbrian
						culture = culture:cornish
						culture = culture:breton
					}
				}
				add = @better_than_the_alternatives_score
			}
		}

	k_cornwall = { # Localized as Cornwall
		color = { 204 153 10 }

		can_create = {
			trigger_if = {
				limit = {
					is_ai = yes
				}
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_brythonic }
			}
		}

		ai_primary_priority = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					culture = culture:cornish
				}
				add = @correct_culture_primary_score
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						culture = culture:welsh
						culture = culture:cumbrian
						culture = culture:breton
					}
				}
				add = @better_than_the_alternatives_score
			}
		}

		capital = c_cornwall
	}

			text = form_germania_christian_trigger

				}
			}
		}
		rule_title_creation_imperial_power_projection_title_creation_trigger = yes
	}

	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_central_germanic }
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}

			custom_description = {
				text = form_hre_kingdoms

				trigger_if = {
					limit = { is_ai = yes }
					NOT = { exists = title:e_hre }

					OR = {
						culture = culture:frisian
						culture = culture:dutch
					}
				}

				#NOT = {
				#	exists = title:e_hre.holder
				#	is_vassal_or_below_of = title:e_hre.holder
				#}
			}
		}

		can_create_on_partition = {
			NOT = {
				game_start_date >= 950.1.1
			}
		}

		ai_primary_priority = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						culture = culture:frisian
						culture = culture:dutch
					}
				}
				add = @correct_culture_primary_score
			}
		}

	k_east_francia = {	#Franconia # Localized as Franconia
		color = { 224 195 65 }

		capital = c_frankfurt

		can_create = {

			custom_description = {
				text = form_hre_kingdoms

				trigger_if = {
					limit = { is_ai = yes }
					NOT = { exists = title:e_hre }
				}

				#NOT = {
				#	exists = title:e_hre.holder
				#	is_vassal_or_below_of = title:e_hre.holder
				#}
			}
		}

		can_create_on_partition = {
			NOT = {
				game_start_date >= 950.1.1
			}
		}

		ai_primary_priority = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					culture = culture:german
				}
				add = @correct_culture_primary_score
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { culture = culture:german }
					culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_central_germanic }

				add = @better_than_the_alternatives_score
			}
		}

	}
}

e_byzantium = { # Localized as Byzantine Empire
	color = { 143 12 125 }

	capital = c_byzantion

	definite_form = yes
	ruler_uses_title_name = no

	can_create = {
		rule_title_creation_imperial_power_projection_title_creation_trigger = yes
		custom_tooltip = {
			text = is_latin_emperor_tt
			NOT = {
				any_held_title = {
					this = title:e_latin_empire
				}
			}
		}
	}

	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_byzantine }
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}
	}

e_transcaucasia = { # Localized as Transcaucasia
	color = { 190 39 39 }

	definite_form = yes

	capital = c_hayk

	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_caucasian }
			}
			add = @better_than_the_alternatives_score
		}
	}

e_baltic_empire = { # Localized as Aisčiai
	color = { 100 40 50 }

	capital = c_trakai # Trakai

	can_create = {
		rule_title_creation_imperial_power_projection_title_creation_trigger = yes
	}

	definite_form = yes

	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_west_slavic }
			}
			add = @better_than_the_alternatives_score
		}
	}

	k_livonia = { # Localized as Livonia
		color = { 110 80 168 }

		capital = c_vidzeme # Riga

		#Titular: created by decision.

		ai_primary_priority = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					culture = culture:latgalian
				}
				add = @correct_culture_primary_score
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						culture = culture:latgalian
					}
				}
				add = @better_than_the_alternatives_score
			}
		}
	}

	color = { 50 150 55 }

	can_create = {
		rule_title_creation_imperial_power_projection_title_creation_trigger = yes
	}

	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_east_slavic }
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}
	}

	cultural_names = {

e_caspian-pontic_steppe = { # Localized as Sarı Düz
	color = { 214 206 193 }

	can_be_named_after_dynasty = no
	can_use_nomadic_naming = no
	ruler_uses_title_name = no
	disable_regnal_numbers = yes

	capital = c_sarai # Itil

	can_create = {
		rule_title_creation_imperial_power_projection_title_creation_trigger = yes
	}

	k_pontic_steppe = { # Localized as Taurica
		color = { 207 166 154 }

		can_create = {
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				NOT = { exists = title:k_pechenegs }
				NOT = { exists = title:k_cumania }

e_kirghiz_khanate = { # Localized as Enesay
	color = { 30 55 90 }

	can_be_named_after_dynasty = no
	can_use_nomadic_naming = no

	capital = c_karabalgasun
	can_create_on_partition = { always = no }
	disable_regnal_numbers = yes

	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = culture:kirghiz
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}
	}

	can_create = {
		rule_title_creation_imperial_power_projection_title_creation_trigger = yes
	}

# Abbasid Caliphate
k_sunni = {
	color = { 55 145 30 }
	
	capital = c_baghdad
	can_be_named_after_dynasty = no
	landless = yes
	figurehead = yes
	allow_domicile = no
	always_follows_primary_heir = yes
	definite_form = yes

	can_create = { always = no }

	# Ceremonial Liege/Regent in personal relation summary
	# (reminder: the ceremonial liege if mechanically a vassal of the ceremonial regent)
	#
	# Scopes
	# ------
	# root: Inspected character (who holds this title).
	# target: Character we are evaluating relationships to (usually local player).
	# title: This title (held by inspected character).
	# liege: Inspected characters liege.
	# vassal: Vassal who matches the trigger below, if any.
	#
	# Alternate descriptions are provided to trim the extra "Your" before this entry in the summary.
	#
	personal_relation_entry = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:target
					scope:liege ?= scope:target
				}
				desc = japan_personal_relation_ceremonial_liege_same
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:liege }
				desc = japan_personal_relation_ceremonial_liege_other
			}
		}
	}

	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_arabic }
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}
	}
}

				NOT = {  culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_mongolic } } #Don't want Ilkhanate making Persia

	}

e_france = { # Localized as Francia
	color = { 11 10 200 }

	#can_create = {
	#
	#	 completely_controls = title:k_france
	#	 completely_controls = title:k_brittany
	#	 completely_controls = title:k_aquitaine
	#}

	capital = c_ile_de_france

	can_create = {
		rule_title_creation_imperial_power_projection_title_creation_trigger = yes
	}

	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = culture:french
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					culture = culture:norman
					culture = culture:occitan
				}
			}
			add = @better_than_the_alternatives_score
		}
	}

	k_toulouse = { # Localized as Toulouse
		color = { 95 24 226 }

		capital = c_toulouse # Toulouse

		can_create = {
			trigger_if = {
				limit = {
					is_ai = yes
				}
				NOT = { has_title = title:k_france
						has_title = title:k_england #Let's not let England make this title in later bookmarks
				}
			}

		}

		ai_primary_priority = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					culture = culture:occitan
				}
				add = @correct_culture_primary_score
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					OR = {
						culture = culture:norman
						culture = culture:french
					}
				}
				add = @better_than_the_alternatives_score
			}
		}
		
		
	}

	k_aynumosir = {
		color = { 196 20 41 }

		capital = c_oshima

		can_create = {
			trigger_if = {
				limit = {
					is_ai = yes
				}
				culture = culture:ainu
				culture = culture:emishi
			}
		}

		ai_primary_priority = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					culture = culture:ainu
					culture = culture:emishi
				}
				add = @correct_culture_primary_score
			}
		}

# China
# Hegemony	 -	Eventual new higher tier title for China
# Empires	 - 	In DLC use an edited version of Paradox's empire setup. Likely break it up even more than just 5 Empires since there's no reason to constrain the titles based on the 10 Kingdoms 5 Dynasties period
# Kingdoms	 - 	Tang - Based on 5 Kingdoms/5 Dynasties period to allow for a leadup to historicallish breakup. Song - Song Circuits (Jin Circuits where it rules later). Yuan - Yuan Provinces. Paradox is using the Song dynasty circuits for all 3 bookmarks and likely will not make alterations for 867 or for northern China under Jin
# Duchies	 -	Tang and Song Dynasty Circuits. Duchies in the DLC represent Zhou/Prefectures of the Tang...except for the times they don't and are instead based on Tang Circuits. I generally will keep the Tang Circuits/Jiedushi based titles for Song and beyond for the sake of allowing greater granularity over time in gameplay that and it makes it so you don't get duchies with 10+ de jure counties
# Counties	 -	Prefectures/Zhou. The maps Zhou are generally based on the Song Dynasty
# Baronies	 -  'Counties'

#Circuits
#Tang - These are mainly Kingdom titles for Jiedushi. Not actually really used as I use the 5 Dynasties Kingdoms/Dynasties for the Kingdom level titles as the Jiedushi are too small and generally wouldn't have held multiple duchies
#Song - Song Circuits - In reality many of these split after the 997 bookmark from larger Circuits and in some cases even after 1066 though the dates of these splits seem all over when I did a search with no set date known. For gameplays sake they will exist from 997 mainly since there's no way to represent the breakdown of the Circuits and naming one of them their unified form would look odd when the other one exists on the de jure map so it'll just have to look odd with a 'Huainan East' controlling both the east and west in 997
#Jin - Jin Circuits. Under e_andong but de_jure e_celestia_china for gameplay purposes. Titles outside China are under e_andong.
#Yuan - Ming Provinces. Why the Ming? Because the Yuan provinces were ungodly huge and work better as empire tier titles

# Korean King
k_yongson_throne = {
	color = { 220 205 250 }

	capital = c_gaeseong
	can_be_named_after_dynasty = no
	landless = yes
	figurehead = yes
	allow_domicile = no
	always_follows_primary_heir = yes
	definite_form = yes
	ruler_uses_title_name = no
	disable_regnal_numbers = yes

	can_create = { always = no }

	# Ceremonial Liege/Regent in personal relation summary
	# (reminder: the ceremonial liege if mechanically a vassal of the ceremonial regent)
	#
	# Scopes
	# ------
	# root: Inspected character (who holds this title).
	# target: Character we are evaluating relationships to (usually local player).
	# title: This title (held by inspected character).
	# liege: Inspected characters liege.
	# vassal: Vassal who matches the trigger below, if any.
	#
	# Alternate descriptions are provided to trim the extra "Your" before this entry in the summary.
	#
	personal_relation_entry = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:target
					scope:liege ?= scope:target
				}
				desc = japan_personal_relation_ceremonial_liege_same
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:liege }
				desc = japan_personal_relation_ceremonial_liege_other
			}
		}
	}

	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_korean }
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}
	}
}

e_goryeo = { # Localized as Goguryeo
	color = { 220 205 250 }

	can_be_named_after_dynasty = no
	can_use_nomadic_naming = no
	disable_regnal_numbers = yes
	
	capital = c_gaeseong

	can_create = {
		trigger_if = {
			limit = {
				culture = {
					OR = {
						has_cultural_pillar = heritage_korean
						any_parent_culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_korean }
					}
				}
			}
			custom_tooltip = {
				text = unify_goryeo_decision_requirement_tt
				NOT = { government_allows = administrative }
			}
		}
	}

	# Ceremonial Liege/Regent in personal relation summary
	#
	# Scopes
	# ------
	# root: Inspected character (who holds this title).
	# target: Character we are evaluating relationships to (usually local player).
	# title: This title (held by inspected character).
	# liege: Inspected characters liege.
	# vassal: Vassal who matches the trigger below, if any.
	#
	# Alternate descriptions are provided to trim the extra "Your" before this entry in the summary.
	#
	personal_relation_entry = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:target
					scope:vassal ?= scope:target
				}
				desc = japan_personal_relation_ceremonial_regent_same
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:vassal }
				desc = japan_personal_relation_ceremonial_regent_other
			}
		}
	}
	personal_relation_vassal = {
		has_title = title:k_yongson_throne
	}

e_brunei = {
	color = { 255 255 0 }

	capital = c_BOR_brunei

	can_create = {
		trigger_if = {
			limit = {
				is_ai = yes
			}
			religion = religion:islam_religion
			culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_austronesian }
		}
	}

	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				religion = religion:islam_religion
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_austronesian }
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				religion = religion:islam_religion
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_austronesian }
			}
			add = @better_than_the_alternatives_score
		}
	}

	k_brunei = { # Localized as Brunei
		color = { 255 255 0 }

		capital = c_BOR_brunei

		can_create = {
			trigger_if = {
				limit = {
					is_ai = yes
				}
				religion = religion:islam_religion
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_austronesian }
			}
		}

		ai_primary_priority = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					religion = religion:islam_religion
					culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_austronesian }
				}
				add = @correct_culture_primary_score
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					religion = religion:islam_religion
					culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_austronesian }
				}
				add = @better_than_the_alternatives_score
			}
		}
	}
}

e_angkor = { # Localized as Dvaravati
	color = { 175 20 60 }

	can_create = {
		rule_title_creation_imperial_power_projection_title_creation_trigger = yes
	}

	k_sukhothai = { # Localized as Sukhothai
		color = { 129 66 112 }

		capital = c_sukhothai

		ai_primary_priority = {
			add = @always_primary_score
		}
	}
	
	k_siam = {
		color = { 88 137 172 }

		capital = c_sukhothai

		can_create = {
			trigger_if = {
				limit = {
					is_ai = yes
				}
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_tai }
			}
		}

		ai_primary_priority = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					culture = culture:tai
				}
				add = @correct_culture_primary_score
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_tai }
				}
				add = @better_than_the_alternatives_score
			}
		}
	}

	k_lavapura = { # Localized as Lavo
		color = { 120 20 64 }

		d_lop_buri = { # Localized as Lavapura
			color = { 176 20 97 }

			cultural_names = {

########################################################################################JAPAN########################################################################################


# Japanese Emperor
k_chrysanthemum_throne = {
	color = { 96 3 42 }

	capital = c_yamashiro
	can_be_named_after_dynasty = no
	landless = yes
	figurehead = yes
	allow_domicile = no
	always_follows_primary_heir = yes
	definite_form = yes
	ruler_uses_title_name = no
	disable_regnal_numbers = yes

	can_create = { always = no }

	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_japonic }
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}
	}

	# Ceremonial Liege/Regent in personal relation summary
	# (reminder: the ceremonial liege if mechanically a vassal of the ceremonial regent)
	#
	# Scopes
	# ------
	# root: Inspected character (who holds this title).
	# target: Character we are evaluating relationships to (usually local player).
	# title: This title (held by inspected character).
	# liege: Inspected characters liege.
	# vassal: Vassal who matches the trigger below, if any.
	#
	# Alternate descriptions are provided to trim the extra "Your" before this entry in the summary.
	#
	personal_relation_entry = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:target
					scope:liege ?= scope:target
				}
				desc = japan_personal_relation_ceremonial_liege_same
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:liege }
				desc = japan_personal_relation_ceremonial_liege_other
			}
		}
	}

	# Male posthumous Ten'no names
	posthumous_regnal_male_names = {
		Ankan Antoku
		Daigo
		En_yU_
		Heizei
		Higashiyama
		Horikawa
		IchijO_

		Kameyama Kanmu Kashiwabara Kazan
		Keitai
		Kinmei
		KO_bun KO_chi KO_kaku_2 KO_kO_ Komatsu KO_mei KO_mu KO_myO_ KO_nin Konoe Kotoku KO_zei

		Murakami
		Nakamikado Nara
		NijO_ Nin_an Ninchi NinkO_ Ninmu NinmyO_ NinshO_

		Reichi Reigen Reimei ReishO_ Reizei
		RokujO_
		Saga_JP Sakuramachi SanjO_
		Seiwa Senka
		ShijO_ Shirakawa
		ShO_kO_ ShO_mu ShO_toku
		SukO_ Sushun Sutoku Suzaku
		Takakura
		Tenji Tenmu
		Toba_JP
		Tsuchimikado
		Uda_JP
		YO_mei YO_zei
		# Unisex
		AnegakO_ji
		Atago
		AyanokO_ji
		BunchO_ BunryU_ BunshO_
		BO_jO_
		Eian
		Enso
		Genka
		GojO_
		HachijO_
		Higashiyama
		Imadegawa
		Iwakura
		Junmei Junmei_2
		Kaen Kan_an Karasuma Kasuga
		Katoku
		Keimei KenshO_ Kentoku
		Kinugasa Kitano Kitashirakawa Kitayama Kiyomizu Kiyotaki
		Koga

		KO_bun KO_ka
		Mantoku Matsunoo
		Meiho Meitei

	posthumous_regnal_female_names = {

e_japan = { # Localized as Nippon
	color = { 255 100 255 }
	can_be_named_after_dynasty = no

	definite_form = yes
	ruler_uses_title_name = no
	disable_regnal_numbers = yes

	capital = c_yamashiro
	
	landless = no
	
	ai_primary_priority = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				culture = { has_cultural_pillar = heritage_japonic }
			}
			add = @correct_culture_primary_score
		}
	}
	
	can_create = {
		rule_title_creation_imperial_power_projection_title_creation_trigger = yes
	}
	
	
	# Ceremonial Liege/Regent in personal relation summary
	#
	# Scopes
	# ------
	# root: Inspected character (who holds this title).
	# target: Character we are evaluating relationships to (usually local player).
	# title: This title (held by inspected character).
	# liege: Inspected characters liege.
	# vassal: Vassal who matches the trigger below, if any.
	#
	# Alternate descriptions are provided to trim the extra "Your" before this entry in the summary.
	#
	personal_relation_entry = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					exists = scope:target
					scope:vassal ?= scope:target
				}
				desc = japan_personal_relation_ceremonial_regent_same
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { exists = scope:vassal }
				desc = japan_personal_relation_ceremonial_regent_other
			}
		}
	}
	personal_relation_vassal = {
		has_title = title:k_chrysanthemum_throne
	}
	

	#Titular/Special

	k_nippon = { #日本 # Localized as Japan
		color = { 166 20 20 }
		can_be_named_after_dynasty = no

		definite_form = yes

		capital = c_yamashiro

		ai_primary_priority = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					culture = culture:yamato
				}
				add = @correct_culture_primary_score
			}
		}
	}

	k_yamato = { #倭王権 # Localized as Nippon
